name: E-commerce Shipping
description: Standard e-commerce checkout: capture delivery name, phone, and shipping address. Designed to replace the per-site repeated form entry — TDEN holds these once, RPs receive via short-term consent valid only for the order fulfillment window.
description_zh: 标准电商结账:收件人姓名、电话、收货地址。用于替代各家网站重复的表单填写 — TDEN 集中保存,RP 仅在订单履约窗口内通过短期授权获得。

fields.justification_zh: 收件人姓名,用于快递员送达。

fields.justification: Required by most courier services for delivery coordination.
fields.justification_zh: 大多数快递公司送达协调所需。
可选:订单确认 + 物流追踪链接。

purpose: Create a shipping order on the merchant's behalf. Data is used solely for fulfilling the specific order and is automatically purged 90 days after delivery confirmation unless extended for warranty / returns by separate consent.
purpose_zh: 代表商户创建发货订单。数据仅用于履约该笔订单,送达后 90 天自动清除,除非用户单独同意延长(用于保修/退换)。
author: TDEN team
